title: Plutarch, Moralia: Virtue and Vice
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Virtue and Vice.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Virtue and Vice.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Virtue and Vice': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
